recipes.name: Spaghetti Carbonara
recipes.instructions: Boil spaghetti. Fry pancetta. Mix eggs and cheese. Combine everything. Season and serve.

recipes.name: Chicken Biryani
recipes.instructions: Cook rice separately. Sauté onions, tomatoes, and spices. Add chicken and yogurt. Layer rice and chicken. Steam and serve.

recipes.name: Vegetable Stir Fry
recipes.instructions: Chop vegetables. Stir-fry with garlic in oil. Add soy sauce. Cook for 5 minutes and serve.

recipes.name: Pancakes
recipes.instructions: Mix ingredients into a batter. Cook on a hot pan. Flip when bubbles form. Serve with syrup.

recipes.name: Grilled Cheese Sandwich
recipes.instructions: Butter bread slices. Place cheese between. Grill until golden brown.

recipes.name: Tomato Soup
recipes.instructions: Sauté onion and garlic. Add tomatoes and broth. Simmer, blend, and season.

recipes.name: Omelette
recipes.instructions: Beat eggs with milk. Cook in butter. Fold and serve.

recipes.name: Banana Smoothie
recipes.instructions: Blend all ingredients until smooth.

recipes.name: Garlic Bread
recipes.instructions: Mix butter with minced garlic. Spread on bread. Bake until golden.

recipes.name: Caesar Salad
recipes.instructions: Chop lettuce. Toss with dressing, croutons, and cheese.

recipes.name: Chocolate Brownies
recipes.instructions: Mix ingredients. Bake at 180°C for 25 minutes.

recipes.name: Fried Rice
recipes.instructions: Cook rice. Fry vegetables and egg. Add rice and soy sauce.

recipes.name: Lemonade
recipes.instructions: Squeeze lemons. Mix with sugar and water.

recipes.name: French Toast
recipes.instructions: Dip bread in egg-milk mix. Fry until golden.

recipes.name: Mango Lassi
recipes.instructions: Blend mango, yogurt, and honey until smooth.

recipes.name: Palak Paneer
recipes.instructions: Blanch spinach and blend. Sauté onions, garlic, and tomatoes. Add paneer and spinach puree. Cook for 5 minutes.

recipes.name: Aloo Paratha
recipes.instructions: Mash potatoes with spices. Stuff in dough. Roll and cook on a tawa with butter.

recipes.name: Chana Masala
recipes.instructions: Sauté onions, garlic, and tomatoes. Add boiled chickpeas and spices. Simmer for 10 minutes.

recipes.name: Dal Tadka
recipes.instructions: Cook lentils. Sauté spices, onions, and tomatoes. Mix with dal and simmer.

recipes.name: Masala Dosa
recipes.instructions: Ferment rice and dal batter. Cook dosas on a tawa. Fill with spiced mashed potatoes and serve with chutney.
